_meta.room: panel of 3 independent dry judges per variant (fresh per variant — no cross-turn contamination)
_meta.scope: no-value-scratchpad (full 3-turn axis) + control-genuine. wrong-seam-perf and amend-value-hidden are corpus cases not yet run live (on-demand); the scorer reads their empty rooms as 'no verdict', never a guess.
_meta.note: Each verdict is one independent judge reading the live value-gate.claude.v1 prompt and judging one atom in isolation. Declared eval input; nothing here touched the real pipeline or the log.
